# nomad_scaling_policies (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_scaling_policies" "example" {
  job_id = "webapp"
  type   = "horizontal"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `job_id` (String) Job ID to use to filter scaling policies.
- `type` (String) Scaling policy type used to filter scaling policies.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `policies` (List of Object) The list of policies that match the search criteria. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String)
- `target` (Map of String)
- `type` (String)
